titles.title: BaderKit: A Python Package for Grid-based Bader Charge Analysis

citation.volume_title: Atoms in molecules: A quantum theory

citation.unstructured_citation: Bader, R. (1994). Atoms in molecules: A quantum theory. Clarendon Press.

citation.article_title: A fast and robust algorithm for bader decomposition of charge density

citation.unstructured_citation: Henkelman, G., Arnaldsson, A., & Jónsson, H. (2006). A fast and robust algorithm for bader decomposition of charge density. Computational Materials Science, 36, 354–360. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.commatsci.2005.04.010
